title: Senior Doctor - Max Healthcare International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Max Healthcare International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Doctor to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
